summary: Cart VAT, Credit Back, and Store Collection features fully tested and working. All backend APIs return correct data. Frontend correctly displays VAT breakdown for trade users, credit back calculation (excluding delivery), and store collection with dropdown selector.

GET /api/shop/stores.details: Returns 4 stores: Chingford, Tonbridge, Gravesend, Sydenham with address, phone, opening hours

POST /api/shop/cart/credit-back-rates.details: Returns rates for product slugs, default rate is 2%

Trade User VAT Breakdown.details: Shows Subtotal (ex. VAT), Total (ex. VAT), VAT (20%), Total (inc. VAT)

Non-Trade User View.details: Shows simple Total with 'Including VAT' note, no VAT breakdown, no credit back

Credit Back Earned Section.details: Shows for trade users only, calculated on ex-VAT product subtotal (delivery excluded)

Delivery Method Toggle.details: Delivery shows £49.99 (or FREE over £500), Collection shows FREE

Store Selector Dropdown.details: Appears when Collection selected, shows 4 stores with address/phone/hours

Collection Removes Delivery Fee.details: Selecting Collection sets delivery fee to £0, Total (ex. VAT) decreases accordingly

Credit Back Excludes Delivery.details: Credit back amount is same regardless of delivery method (calculated on product subtotal only)

Free Delivery Over £500.details: Orders over £500 show FREE delivery, no 'spend more' message

test_calculations_verified.Credit_back_calculation: Product subtotal (ex VAT) × 2% = Credit back (delivery excluded)
test_calculations_verified.Example_1: £183.60 subtotal + £49.99 delivery = £233.59 total ex VAT, VAT = £46.72, Total inc VAT = £280.31, Credit back = £3.67 (2% of £183.60)
test_calculations_verified.Example_2: £100.00 subtotal, Credit back = £2.00 (same with delivery or collection)

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - localStorage simulation used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cart page features fully implemented. Trade users see VAT breakdown (Subtotal ex VAT, Total ex VAT, VAT 20%, Total inc VAT) and Credit Back Earned section. Non-trade users see simple Total with 'Including VAT' note. Delivery method toggle works: Delivery £49.99 (FREE over £500), Collection FREE with store selector dropdown. Credit back is calculated on ex-VAT product subtotal only (delivery excluded). Stores endpoint returns 4 stores from showrooms collection. Credit back rates endpoint returns 2% default rate.
